name: Donald J. Trump
role: 45th & 47th President of the United States (2017–2021, 2025–present)
quote: Make America Great Again. We will make America great again.

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
role: 46th President of the United States (2021–2025); Vice President under Obama (2009–2017)
quote: America is back. America is back. Diplomacy is back at the center of our foreign policy.

name: Barack H. Obama
role: 44th President of the United States (2009–2017); First African American president
quote: Yes we can. Change will not come if we wait for some other person or some other time.

name: George W. Bush
role: 43rd President of the United States (2001–2009); Led US into Afghanistan and Iraq wars
quote: Either you are with us, or you are with the terrorists.

name: William J. Clinton
role: 42nd President of the United States (1993–2001); impeached by House in 1998
quote: There is nothing wrong with America that cannot be cured by what is right with America.

name: J.D. Vance
role: 50th Vice President of the United States (2025–present); former Senator from Ohio
quote: I think it's very important for the United States to maintain global alliances, but those alliances have to be good for the American people.

name: Kamala D. Harris
role: 49th Vice President of the United States (2021–2025); First woman, first Black and South Asian VP; 2024 Democratic presidential nominee
quote: You are the ones who are going to shape the future of the United States of America.

name: Marco Rubio
role: 72nd Secretary of State (2025–present); former US Senator from Florida (2011–2025)
quote: America must remain the most powerful nation on earth. Our strength is essential to preserve the global order.

name: Pete Hegseth
role: 29th Secretary of Defense (2025–present); former Fox News host; Army National Guard veteran
quote: We want a military that is ready to fight and win. Anything that degrades readiness must go.

name: Elon Musk
role: Special Government Employee; Co-head of Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE, 2025); CEO of Tesla and SpaceX; owner of X (Twitter)
quote: The goal of DOGE is to cut government waste, fraud, and abuse. We are going to do it.

name: Stephen Miller
role: Deputy Chief of Staff for Policy (2025–present); key architect of Trump immigration and domestic policy
quote: Our immigration system must serve the American worker first. That's not a radical idea — it's the law.

name: Mitch McConnell
role: US Senator from Kentucky (1985–2025); Senate Majority/Minority Leader (2007–2025); blocked Merrick Garland SCOTUS nomination in 2016
quote: One of my proudest moments was when I looked Barack Obama in the eye and I said, 'Mr. President, you will not fill the Supreme Court vacancy.'

name: Chuck Schumer
role: US Senate Minority Leader (2025–present); Senate Majority Leader (2021–2025); Senator from New York (1999–present)
quote: Donald Trump will be a historically bad president. That is why I and many others will fight him tooth and nail.

name: Nancy Pelosi
role: House Minority Leader; 52nd & 60th Speaker of the House (2007–2011, 2019–2023); First woman Speaker; impeached Trump twice
quote: We hold these truths to be self-evident, that all men are created equal. These are the words that were so important to our founders and still guide us today.

name: Hakeem Jeffries
role: House Minority Leader (2023–present); Representative from New York; first Black leader of a congressional party caucus
quote: House Democrats will always put the American people first. We will work every single day to deliver lower costs, better jobs, and safer communities.

name: Bernie Sanders
role: US Senator from Vermont (2007–present); 2016 & 2020 Democratic presidential candidate; Independent-Democratic Socialist
quote: The issue of wealth and income inequality is the great moral issue of our time, it is the great economic issue of our time, and it is the great political issue of our time.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
role: US Representative from New York (2019–present); youngest woman elected to Congress; lead sponsor of Green New Deal
quote: We need a Green New Deal — a massive, national mobilization of every resource to decarbonize our economy and rebuild it from the ground up.

name: John G. Roberts Jr.
role: 17th Chief Justice of the United States (2005–present); appointed by George W. Bush; has cast pivotal swing votes on ACA and presidential immunity
quote: It is not our job to protect the people from the consequences of their political choices.

name: Ketanji Brown Jackson
role: Associate Justice, US Supreme Court (2022–present); first Black woman on the Supreme Court; appointed by Biden
quote: With my appointment, our highest court will now reflect the beauty of our diverse nation more fully than ever before.

name: Clarence Thomas
role: Associate Justice, US Supreme Court (1991–present); longest-serving current justice; leading originalist; subject of Senate ethics investigations
quote: I'm going to do what I think is right — and let the critics be critics.

name: Ron DeSantis
role: Governor of Florida (2019–present); 2024 Republican presidential candidate; architect of 'anti-woke' state legislation
quote: Florida is where woke goes to die. We are not going to allow this ideology to take root in the state of Florida.

name: Gavin Newsom
role: Governor of California (2019–present); former Mayor of San Francisco; leading Democratic voice against Trump second term
quote: California has always led — not waited. We will continue to advance climate action, healthcare, and civil rights regardless of what Washington does.

name: Jerome H. Powell
role: 16th Chair of the Federal Reserve (2018–present); reappointed by Biden; managing post-COVID inflation and 2025 tariff uncertainty
quote: We remain committed to bringing inflation back down to 2 percent. We will use our tools as needed to achieve that goal.

name: Scott Bessent
role: 79th Secretary of the Treasury (2025–present); former hedge fund manager; oversees tariff negotiations and debt management
quote: The three-three-three plan: 3% growth, 3% deficit reduction, and 3 million additional barrels of oil per day.

name: Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
role: Civil rights leader; President, Southern Christian Leadership Conference (1957–1968); Nobel Peace Prize laureate (1964); assassinated April 4, 1968
quote: I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character.
